summary: Frontend-only testing of /standards architecture migration. All 16 test cases verified — pages load, redirects work, components render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: DoctrineStack layer colors confirmed: coral (#D85A30), amber (#BA7517), teal (#0F6E56), navy (#002244), purple (#534AB7) — all correct
Note: The 'Apply for Admission' link in tfoot goes to /ground-0-briefing (not a direct 'Apply for Admission' text) — it shows 'Apply for Admission →' text, PASSES

test_results.12_new_carrier_document_system: PASS — loads with H1 'New Carrier Document System'
test_results.14_coral_cta_16_deadly_sins: PASS — coral CTA link to /standards/16-deadly-sins present in Good Cop/Bad Cop block

context_for_next_testing_agent: All /standards routes working. /products/* redirects all confirmed. Navbar has Standards dropdown (3 sub-items) and Ground 0 dropdown (2 sub-items). No REACH Assessment or Partners in top nav. FMCSADomainTable has 7 rows, DoctrineStack has 5 layers with correct colors.
